normal_prompts: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access
Create an ecommerce admin app with products, orders, and inventory management
Build a project tracker with tasks, assignees, and reporting
Create a billing platform with invoices, customers, and payment reminders
Build a school management app with students, teachers, and attendance
Create a clinic portal with patient records and appointment scheduling
Build a helpdesk app with tickets, agents, and SLA dashboard
Create an HR app with employees, leave requests, and approvals
Build a logistics system with shipments, drivers, and tracking
Create a subscription SaaS backend with users, plans, and invoices
edge_prompts: I need something like Salesforce but simpler
Make a system with users and no authentication
Create an app with no database but full CRUD APIs
Build a platform with admin role but no permissions
Create dashboard only and also full transaction workflow
Build a healthcare CRM and do not store patient data
Make multi-tenant ERP with one global user table and strict isolation
Create an app with contacts and invoices but no entities
